# Legacy Monolithic Skills (Archived)

These files are the **original monolithic role-based SKILL files** that were decomposed into 24 atomic skills in the `refactor/mcem-pipeline-prompt-optimizations` branch.

They are preserved here for reference only. **Do not load these as active skills** — they have been superseded by the atomic skills in the parent directory.

## Mapping

| Legacy File | Replaced By |
|---|---|
| `CSAM_SKILL.md` | `milestone-health-review`, `delivery-accountability-mapping`, `execution-monitoring`, `customer-outcome-scoping`, `commit-gate-enforcement`, `adoption-excellence-review`, `value-realization-pack`, `expansion-signal-routing` |
| `Cloud_Solution_Architect_SKILL.md` | `architecture-feasibility-check`, `architecture-execution-handoff`, `commit-gate-enforcement`, `execution-authority-clarification`, `unified-constraint-check`, `non-linear-progression` |
| `Solution_Engineer_SKILL.md` | `proof-plan-orchestration`, `task-hygiene-flow`, `exit-criteria-validation`, `customer-evidence-pack`, `handoff-readiness-validation` |
| `Specialist_SKILL.md` | `pipeline-qualification`, `pipeline-hygiene-triage`, `risk-surfacing`, `role-orchestration`, `partner-motion-awareness`, `handoff-readiness-validation` |

See `.github/documents/SPEC-skill-restructure.md` for the full migration specification.
